chapter_title.en: Chapter on Barter and Transaction with Immediate Buyback (inah)

text: 4032 - رَوَى يُونُسُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ عَنْ غَيْرِ وَاحِدٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ فِي الرَّجُلِ يُبَايِعُ الرَّجُلَ عَلَى الشَّيْ‌ءِ فَقَالَ لَا بَأْسَ إِذَا كَانَ أَصْلُ الشَّيْ‌ءِ حَلَالًا.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4032 - Yunus ibn Abd al-Rahman narrated from more than one person, from Abu Abdullah (as), regarding a man who trades with another man over something.
Imam (as) said: "There is no harm, as long as the origin of the item is lawful."
